data.name: NKS_AMUSEMENTS_COMMAND_SOLVER_DESC
data.value: Féach an féidir leat cothromóidí matamaitice a réiteach in am

data.name: NKS_AMUSEMENTS_SOLVER_CORRECT
data.value: Réitithe go foirfe!

data.name: NKS_AMUSEMENTS_SOLVER_INCORRECT
data.value: Réitíodh go mícheart.

data.name: NKS_AMUSEMENTS_SETTINGS_SNAKER_DELAY_DESC
data.value: Cé mhéad milleasoicind atá le fanacht roimh an gcéad cheann eile a scríobh?

data.name: NKS_AMUSEMENTS_COMMAND_SPEEDPRESS_DESC
data.value: Féach an féidir leat eochair a bhrú in am

data.name: NKS_AMUSEMENTS_SPEEDPRESS_NOTONTIME
data.value: Carachtar nach bhfuil brúite in am.

data.name: NKS_AMUSEMENTS_SPEEDPRESS_CORRECT
data.value: Tá an carachtar ceart brúite agat!

data.name: NKS_AMUSEMENTS_SPEEDPRESS_INCORRECT
data.value: Tá an carachtar mícheart brúite agat.

data.name: NKS_AMUSEMENTS_SPEEDPRESS_ESC
data.value: Brúigh ESC chun imeacht.

data.name: NKS_AMUSEMENTS_SETTINGS_COMMON_MINREDCOLOR_DESC
data.value: Íosleibhéal dath dearg. Is é 0 an luach íosta a nglactar leis agus is é 255 an t-uasluach a nglactar leis.

data.name: NKS_AMUSEMENTS_SETTINGS_COMMON_MINGREENCOLOR_DESC
data.value: Íosleibhéal dath glas. Is é 0 an luach íosta a nglactar leis agus is é 255 an t-uasluach a nglactar leis.

data.name: NKS_AMUSEMENTS_SETTINGS_COMMON_MINBLUECOLOR_DESC
data.value: Íosleibhéal dath gorm. Is é 0 an luach íosta a nglactar leis agus is é 255 an t-uasluach a nglactar leis.

data.name: NKS_AMUSEMENTS_SETTINGS_COMMON_MINCOLOR_DESC
data.value: Leibhéal dath íosta. Is é 0 an luach íosta a nglactar leis agus is é 255 le haghaidh 255 dathanna nó 16 le haghaidh 16 dathanna an t-uasluach a nglactar leis.

data.name: NKS_AMUSEMENTS_SETTINGS_COMMON_MAXREDCOLOR_DESC
data.value: Uasleibhéal dath dearg. Is é 0 an luach íosta a nglactar leis agus is é 255 an t-uasluach a nglactar leis.

data.name: NKS_AMUSEMENTS_SETTINGS_COMMON_MAXGREENCOLOR_DESC
data.value: Uasleibhéal dath glas. Is é 0 an luach íosta a nglactar leis agus is é 255 an t-uasluach a nglactar leis.

data.name: NKS_AMUSEMENTS_SETTINGS_COMMON_MAXBLUECOLOR_DESC
data.value: Uasleibhéal dath gorm. Is é 0 an luach íosta a nglactar leis agus is é 255 an t-uasluach a nglactar leis.

data.name: NKS_AMUSEMENTS_SETTINGS_SOLVER_SHOWINPUT_DESC
data.value: Cibé an dtaispeánfar cad atá scríofa sa leid ionchuir.

data.name: NKS_AMUSEMENTS_SETTINGS_SOLVER_MININUM_DESC
data.value: Cad é an t-íoslíon atá le roghnú?

data.name: NKS_AMUSEMENTS_SETTINGS_SOLVER_MAXINUM_DESC
data.value: Cad é an t-uaslíon atá le roghnú?

data.name: NKS_AMUSEMENTS_SETTINGS_SNAKER_TRUECOLORS_DESC
data.value: Gníomhachtaigh an tacaíocht dath fíor.

data.name: NKS_AMUSEMENTS_SETTINGS_SPEEDPRESS_TIMEOUT_DESC
data.value: Cé mhéad milleasoicind chun fanacht leis an eochairbhrú roimh an teorainn ama? (I deacracht saincheaptha)

data.name: NKS_AMUSEMENTS_SETTINGS_SNAKER_STAGEDELAY_DESC
data.value: Cé mhéad milleasoicind atá le fanacht roimh an gcéad chéim eile a tharraingt?

data.name: NKS_AMUSEMENTS_COMMAND_SPEEDPRESS_SWITCH_E_DESC
data.value: Tosaíonn an cluiche i deacracht éasca

data.name: NKS_AMUSEMENTS_COMMAND_SPEEDPRESS_SWITCH_M_DESC
data.value: Tosaíonn an cluiche i deacracht mheán

data.name: NKS_AMUSEMENTS_COMMAND_SPEEDPRESS_SWITCH_H_DESC
data.value: Tosaíonn an cluiche i gcruachás

data.name: NKS_AMUSEMENTS_COMMAND_SPEEDPRESS_SWITCH_V_DESC
data.value: Tosaíonn an cluiche i deacracht an-deacair

data.name: NKS_AMUSEMENTS_COMMAND_SPEEDPRESS_SWITCH_C_DESC
data.value: Tosaíonn an cluiche i deacracht saincheaptha. Tabhair faoi deara gur chóir an teorainn ama saincheaptha i milleasoicindí a scríobh mar argóint.

data.name: NKS_AMUSEMENTS_COMMAND_QUOTE_TEXTLOCATION_DESC
data.value: Roghnaigh an suíomh téacs dul chun cinn is fearr leat.

data.name: NKS_AMUSEMENTS_SOLVER_NEEDSNUM
data.value: Ní féidir leat ach na huimhreacha a scríobh.

data.name: NKS_AMUSEMENTS_SOLVER_PRESSTOEXIT
data.value: Brúigh "q" chun imeacht.

data.name: NKS_AMUSEMENTS_COMMAND_SNAKER_DESC
data.value: An cluiche nathair!

data.name: NKS_AMUSEMENTS_COMMAND_METEOR_DESC
data.value: Is spásárthach tú agus tá na meteors ag teacht chun tú a mhilleadh. An féidir leat é a shábháil?

data.name: NKS_AMUSEMENTS_COMMON_GAMEOVER
data.value: Cluiche thart

data.name: NKS_AMUSEMENTS_COMMON_UNEXPECTEDERROR
data.value: Earráid gan choinne

data.name: NKS_AMUSEMENTS_SETTINGS_SHIPS_USEPOWERLINE_DESC
data.value: Cibé an n-úsáidfear PowerLine chun an spásárthach a sholáthar nó an úsáidfear an caighdeán is mó ná an carachtar. Más mian leat PowerLine a úsáid le Meteor, ní mór duit cló cuí a shuiteáil le tacaíocht PowerLine.

data.name: NKS_AMUSEMENTS_SETTINGS_SHIPS_METEORSPEED_DESC
data.value: Sonraíonn an luas cluiche i milleasoicindí.

data.name: NKS_AMUSEMENTS_COMMAND_BACKRACE_DESC
data.value: An dtugann tú siar an capall mícheart?

data.name: NKS_AMUSEMENTS_COMMAND_HANGMAN_DESC
data.value: Tosaíonn an cluiche Hangman

data.name: NKS_AMUSEMENTS_COMMAND_HANGMAN_SWITCH_HARDCORE_DESC
data.value: Litir mícheart amháin agus tá tú ar crochadh!

data.name: NKS_AMUSEMENTS_COMMAND_HANGMAN_SWITCH_PRACTICE_DESC
data.value: Déan do scileanna Hangman a thástáil trí litir randamach a chaitheamh.

data.name: NKS_AMUSEMENTS_COMMAND_METERORDODGE_DESC
data.value: Is spásárthach tú agus tá na meteors ag teacht chun tú a mhilleadh. An féidir leat iad a sheachaint?

data.name: NKS_AMUSEMENTS_COMMAND_QUOTE_DESC
data.value: Faigheann sé luachan randamach

data.name: NKS_AMUSEMENTS_COMMAND_ROULETTE_DESC
data.value: Roulette na rúise

data.name: NKS_AMUSEMENTS_COMMAND_SHIPDUET_DESC
data.value: Tá dhá spásárthach ag troid lena chéile. Lámhaigh amháin agus séideadh an spásárthach. Is cluiche áitiúil dhá imreoir é seo.

data.name: NKS_AMUSEMENTS_COMMAND_WORDLE_DESC
data.value: Insamhlóir cluiche Wordle

data.name: NKS_AMUSEMENTS_COMMAND_WORDLE_SWITCH_ORIG_DESC
data.value: Seinn an cluiche Wordle ar dtús

data.name: NKS_AMUSEMENTS_BACKRACE_HORSEID
data.value: Capall

data.name: NKS_AMUSEMENTS_BACKRACE_KEYBINDINGS
data.value: [ENTER] Cuir tús leis an rás | [ESC] Scoir | [UP/SÍOS] Bog an roghnúchán

data.name: NKS_AMUSEMENTS_BACKRACE_YOUWIN
data.value: Bhuaigh do chapall an rás!

data.name: NKS_AMUSEMENTS_BACKRACE_YOULOSE
data.value: Chaill do chapall an rás!

data.name: NKS_AMUSEMENTS_HANGMAN_YOULOSE
data.value: Tá tú ar crochadh!

data.name: NKS_AMUSEMENTS_HANGMAN_YOUWIN
data.value: Bhuaigh tú!

data.name: NKS_AMUSEMENTS_ROULETTE_QUESTION
data.value: Cad é do geall?

data.name: NKS_AMUSEMENTS_ROULETTE_RIGHT
data.value: Rinne tú buille faoi thuairim ceart!

data.name: NKS_AMUSEMENTS_ROULETTE_WRONG
data.value: Fuair tú mícheart é.

data.name: NKS_AMUSEMENTS_ROULETTE_UNLUCKY
data.value: Ach, tá tú mí-ádh. fear caillte na himeartha.

data.name: NKS_AMUSEMENTS_ROULETTE_LUCKY
data.value: Tá an t-ádh ort! Buaiteoir!

data.name: NKS_AMUSEMENTS_SHIPDUET_DRAW
data.value: Is tarraingt é.

data.name: NKS_AMUSEMENTS_SHIPDUET_WINNING
data.value: Bhuaigh imreoir {0}!

data.name: NKS_AMUSEMENTS_SPEEDPRESS_CURRENTCHAR
data.value: Carachtar reatha:

data.name: NKS_AMUSEMENTS_WORDLE_WIN
data.value: Rinne tú buille faoi thuairim an focal ceart! Bhuaigh tú!

data.name: NKS_AMUSEMENTS_SETTINGS_SNAKER_DESC
data.value: Cluiche nathair.

data.name: NKS_AMUSEMENTS_SETTINGS_QUOTE_DESC
data.value: Taispeánann sé Sleachta cáiliúla deasa duit.

data.name: NKS_AMUSEMENTS_SETTINGS_SPEEDPRESS_DIFFICULTY_DESC
data.value: Roghnaigh an deacracht is fearr leat, áit a bhfuil 0 éasca, 1 meánach, 2 crua, 3 an-chrua, agus 4 cinn saincheaptha.

data.name: NKS_AMUSEMENTS_SETTINGS_SHIPS_SHIPDUETUSEPOWERLINE_DESC
data.value: Cibé an n-úsáidfear PowerLine chun an spásárthach a sholáthar nó an úsáidfear an caighdeán is mó ná an carachtar. Más mian leat PowerLine a úsáid le ShipDuet, ní mór duit cló cuí a shuiteáil le tacaíocht PowerLine.

data.name: NKS_AMUSEMENTS_COMMAND_SWITCH_COMMON_DESC
data.value: Úsáideann sé an liosta focal coitianta.

data.name: NKS_AMUSEMENTS_COMMAND_SWITCH_UNCOMMON_DESC
data.value: Úsáideann sé an liosta focal iomlán.

data.name: NKS_AMUSEMENTS_COMMAND_PONG_DESC
data.value: An cluiche ping-pong!

data.name: NKS_AMUSEMENTS_PONG_SCORE
data.value: Scór

data.name: NKS_AMUSEMENTS_SETTINGS_EXCEPTION_ENTRIESFAILED
data.value: Theip ar na hiontrálacha socruithe a fháil.

data.name: NKS_AMUSEMENTS_HOMEPAGE_BACKRACE
data.value: Rásaíocht Capall

data.name: NKS_AMUSEMENTS_HOMEPAGE_HANGMAN
data.value: Crochaire

data.name: NKS_AMUSEMENTS_HOMEPAGE_METEORDODGE
data.value: Meteor Dodge

data.name: NKS_AMUSEMENTS_HOMEPAGE_METEORSHOOTER
data.value: Cluiche Líne Meteor Shooter

data.name: NKS_AMUSEMENTS_HOMEPAGE_PONG
data.value: pong

data.name: NKS_AMUSEMENTS_HOMEPAGE_SHIPDUET
data.value: Díséad Loinge

data.name: NKS_AMUSEMENTS_HOMEPAGE_SNAKER
data.value: Snaker

data.name: NKS_AMUSEMENTS_HOMEPAGE_WORDLE
data.value: Focal

data.name: NKS_AMUSEMENTS_HOMEPAGE_WORDLEORIG
data.value: Wordle (bunaidh)

data.name: NKS_AMUSEMENTS_QUOTE_QUOTEUNKNOWN
data.value: Athfhriotail anaithnid.

data.name: NKS_AMUSEMENTS_QUOTE_AUTHORUNKNOWN
data.value: Údar anaithnid.

data.name: NKS_AMUSEMENTS_SETTINGS_COMMON_COLOR_DESC
data.value: Ligeann sé seo duit na dathanna a chumrú

data.name: NKS_AMUSEMENTS_SETTINGS_SOLVER_DESC
data.value: Ligeann an chuid seo duit Réitigh a chumrú.

data.name: NKS_AMUSEMENTS_SETTINGS_SPEEDPRESS_DESC
data.value: Ligeann an chuid seo duit SpeedPress a chumrú.

data.name: NKS_AMUSEMENTS_SETTINGS_SHIPS_DESC
data.value: Ligeann an chuid seo duit Meteor agus ShipDuet a chumrú.

data.name: NKS_SCREENSAVERPACKS_COMMON_SETTINGS_MAXCOLOR_DESC
data.value: Uasleibhéal datha. Is é 0 an luach íosta a nglactar leis agus is é 255 le haghaidh 255 dathanna nó 16 le haghaidh 16 dathanna an t-uasluach a nglactar leis.
